acceptance_criteria.text: Table blueprint category creates a useful analysis result, not a static placeholder.
proof: agent_blueprint_workspace.py routes table output through analyze_table_with_llm

acceptance_criteria.text: Table result includes summary, exceptions, rows_to_review, recommendations, provenance, and LLM/fallback metadata.
proof: Unit tests cover LLM generator and fallback paths
Production smoke returned analysis_source=gigachat, llm_analysis_used=true, exceptions_count=2, rows_to_review_count=2

acceptance_criteria.text: Table agent has no external send/publish/import side effects and stops at final approval.
proof: Unit test verifies no capability step
Production smoke returned external_dispatch_performed=false and approval_type=final_output

acceptance_criteria.text: Run review journal exposes table-specific human details.
proof: _output_details includes Исключений, Строк к проверке, and Внешняя отправка
Production smoke validated journal detail labels

acceptance_criteria.text: Local tests, lint, build, production deploy, and production table smoke pass.
proof: production table smoke passed and cleaned fixture
gaps: Existing Sber/GigaChat SSL workaround warning appears in logs.
Authenticated browser UI click-through was not performed in this phase.

known_gaps: Table editing/export/import is intentionally not implemented.
No authenticated browser UI click-through for the table agent was performed in this phase; API/runtime smoke passed.
